Full
Responsibility
Theory and
Tactics
The third of The 5 Core Habits - Full Responsibility. This one
of the habits that will make you the most money.
Full Responsibility Theory
- There are no excuses.
- Everything is ALWAYS your fault
- Your actions are the only thing you can control
- When you take 100% responsibility, you get out of the
victim mindset and see SOLUTIONS
- “We are all self-made, only millionaires and billionaires
own it.”
Full Responsibility
- Personel
- Watch the videos daily
- Do what is in them
